items.title: Whole-body vibration-based interventions and dynamic balance in older patients with stroke: a systematic review and multilevel meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and multilevel meta-analysis of 23 RCTs (N=862) found that whole-body vibration (WBV) interventions significantly improved dynamic balance in older patients after stroke, with moderate to large effect sizes.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和多水平荟萃分析证实了全身振动（WBV）干预对老年卒中患者动态平衡的积极作用。在临床实践中，你可以将WBV作为辅助疗法，与常规平衡训练结合，以进一步改善老年卒中患者的平衡功能。
items.titleZh: 全身振动干预对老年卒中患者动态平衡的影响：一项系统综述和多水平荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对23项随机对照试验（N=862）进行的系统综述和多水平荟萃分析发现，全身振动（WBV）干预显著改善了老年卒中患者的动态平衡，效应量为中等到大。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and multilevel meta-analysis confirms the positive effects of whole-body vibration (WBV) interventions on dynamic balance in older stroke patients. In clinical practice, you can integrate WBV as an adjunctive therapy with conventional balance training to further improve balance function in older stroke patients.

items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis of 11 studies (N=4060 patients) found that female athletes had lower rates of return to sport after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared to male athletes (OR 0.72; 95% CI 0.54-0.96; p=0.03).
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和探索性荟萃分析揭示了前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）后重返运动（RTS）结果的性别差异。女性运动员ACL损伤率更高，但RTS率却较低。在评估和指导女性运动员RTS时，你必须考虑这些性别差异，并针对性地优化康复策略以提高RTS成功率。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后重返运动是否存在性别差异？一项系统综述和探索性荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对11项研究（N=4060例患者）进行的系统综述和探索性荟萃分析发现，女性运动员在前交叉韧带重建术后重返运动的比率低于男性运动员（OR 0.72；95% CI 0.54-0.96；p=0.03）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis reveals sex disparities in return-to-sport (RTS) outcomes after ACL reconstruction (ACLR). Female athletes have higher ACL injury rates but lower RTS rates. When assessing and guiding female athletes back to sport, you must consider these sex differences and tailor rehabilitation strategies to improve RTS success.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: The Effect of Duration of Supervised Rehabilitation on Outcomes Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
items.summary: A systematic review of 20 studies (N=12,233 patients) suggests that longer durations of supervised rehabilitation (e.g., >6 months) following ACL reconstruction are associated with improved functional outcomes and reduced re-injury risk.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述探讨了监督下康复时长对前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）后结局的影响。结果表明，延长监督康复时间与更好的功能恢复和更低的再损伤风险相关。你应倡导更长时间的、结构化的监督康复，以优化患者的长期结局和RTS成功率。
items.titleZh: 监督下康复时长对前交叉韧带重建术后结局的影响：一项系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项对20项研究（N=12,233例患者）进行的系统综述表明，前交叉韧带重建术后更长时间的监督康复（例如超过6个月）与改善的功能结局和降低的再损伤风险相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review explores the impact of supervised rehabilitation duration on outcomes after ACL reconstruction (ACLR). The results indicate that longer supervised rehabilitation is associated with better functional recovery and lower re-injury risk. You should advocate for extended, structured supervised rehabilitation to optimize long-term outcomes and return-to-sport success rates for your patients.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Comparative effects of different intensities of aerobic and resistance exercise on glycemic control and cardiorespiratory fitness in middle-aged older patients with type 2 diabetes: a network meta-analysis.
items.summary: A network meta-analysis of 85 RCTs (N=6850 participants) found that moderate-to-high intensity aerobic and resistance combined exercise was most effective for glycemic control (HbA1c reduction -0.62%) and cardiorespiratory fitness in middle-aged and older adults with type 2 diabetes.
items.curatedReason: 这项网络荟萃分析比较了不同强度有氧和阻力运动对中年和老年2型糖尿病患者血糖控制及心肺适能的影响。结果明确了中高强度联合训练的优势。在临床实践中，你应优先推荐这些患者进行中高强度有氧和阻力联合训练，以最大化其代谢和心血管获益。
items.titleZh: 不同强度有氧和阻力运动对中年和老年2型糖尿病患者血糖控制及心肺适能的比较效应：一项网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对85项随机对照试验（N=6850名参与者）进行的网络荟萃分析发现，中高强度有氧和阻力联合运动在改善2型糖尿病中老年患者血糖控制（HbA1c降低-0.62%）和心肺适能方面最为有效。
items.curatedReasonEn: This network meta-analysis compares the effects of different intensities of aerobic and resistance exercise on glycemic control and cardiorespiratory fitness in middle-aged and older patients with type 2 diabetes. The results clearly favor moderate-to-high intensity combined training. In clinical practice, you should prioritize prescribing moderate-to-high intensity combined aerobic and resistance training for these patients to maximize their metabolic and cardiovascular benefits.

items.title: Effect of pelvic floor muscle training with or without dynamic neuromuscular stabilization-based breathing on menstrual pain and symptoms of primary dysmenorrhea: a randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=66) found that Pelvic Floor Muscle Training (PFMT) with or without Dynamic Neuromuscular Stabilization (DNS)-based breathing exercises significantly improved menstrual symptoms, pain, and quality of life in women with primary dysmenorrhea.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验发现，盆底肌训练结合或不结合DNS呼吸练习，都能显著改善原发性痛经患者的月经症状、疼痛和生活质量。将其纳入痛经患者的康复方案，作为非药物干预的有力补充。
items.titleZh: 盆底肌训练结合或不结合动态神经肌肉稳定（DNS）呼吸法对原发性痛经患者月经疼痛及症状的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=66）显示，盆底肌训练（PFMT）无论是否结合动态神经肌肉稳定（DNS）呼吸练习，均能显著改善原发性痛经女性的月经症状、疼痛和生活质量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT found that pelvic floor muscle training, with or without DNS-based breathing, significantly improved menstrual symptoms, pain, and quality of life in primary dysmenorrhea. Incorporate it into your rehabilitation protocol for dysmenorrhea patients as a strong non-pharmacological intervention.

items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review compared early (motion ≤ 14 days) versus delayed (motion ≥ 28 days) rehabilitation programs after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) to assess functional outcomes and complications.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述比较了反向全肩关节置换术（rTSA）后早期康复与传统康复的功能结果和并发症。了解早期启动（14天内）与延迟启动（28天后）康复方案的风险和益处，指导你优化rTSA术后患者的康复路径。
items.titleZh: 反向全肩关节置换术后早期与常规康复：功能结局与并发症的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述比较了反向全肩关节置换术（rTSA）后早期（运动≤14天）与延迟（运动≥28天）康复方案，以评估功能结局和并发症。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review compares functional outcomes and complications of early vs. conventional rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA). Understand the risks and benefits of initiating rehabilitation early (within 14 days) versus later (after 28 days) to optimize post-rTSA patient pathways.

items.title: The association between cognitive inhibitory control and language performance in post-stroke aphasia: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis confirmed a significant association between cognitive inhibitory control and language performance in individuals with post-stroke aphasia, highlighting the role of executive function in language processing.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析量化了认知抑制控制与卒中后失语症患者语言表现之间的关联。其结果证实抑制控制是语言处理的重要组成部分，支持在失语症康复中纳入认知训练，尤其是针对抑制功能的干预。
items.titleZh: 认知抑制控制与卒中后失语症患者语言表现的关联：一项系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析证实，认知抑制控制与卒中后失语症患者的语言表现之间存在显著关联，突出了执行功能在语言处理中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis quantifies the association between cognitive inhibitory control and language performance in post-stroke aphasia. The results confirm inhibitory control's critical role in language processing, supporting the integration of cognitive training—specifically inhibitory function interventions—into aphasia rehabilitation.

items.title: Association Between Postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test Scores and Length of Hospital Stay in Patients with Chronic Subdural Hematoma: A Prospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study (N=109) found that lower postoperative Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) scores were significantly associated with a prolonged length of hospital stay in patients with chronic subdural hematoma.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究证实了慢性硬膜下血肿（CSDH）术后Mini-BESTest评分与住院时间（LOS）的关联。术后平衡评估，特别是Mini-BESTest，是预测患者住院时间和康复进程的关键指标，可用于早期识别有延长住院风险的患者并进行干预。
items.titleZh: 慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后Mini-BESTest评分与住院时间关联的前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究（N=109）发现，慢性硬膜下血肿患者术后Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) 评分较低与住院时间延长显著相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study confirms the association between postoperative Mini-BESTest scores and length of hospital stay (LOS) in chronic subdural hematoma (CSDH) patients. Postoperative balance assessment, especially with Mini-BESTest, is a key indicator for predicting LOS and rehabilitation progress, enabling early identification and intervention for patients at risk of prolonged hospitalization.

items.title: Bilateral cerebellar intermittent theta-burst stimulation combined with laryngeal elevation training promotes neurorestoration in post-stroke dysphagia.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=60) found that bilateral cerebellar intermittent theta-burst stimulation (iTBS) combined with laryngeal elevation training significantly improved swallowing function and neurorestoration in post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，双侧小脑间歇性theta脉冲刺激（iTBS）结合喉上抬训练能促进卒中后吞咽困难患者的神经恢复和吞咽功能改善。这项结合神经调控与行为训练的新方法，为你提供了治疗卒中后吞咽困难的新思路和潜在有效方案。
items.titleZh: 双侧小脑间歇性theta脉冲刺激联合喉上抬训练促进卒中后吞咽困难的神经修复
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=60）发现，双侧小脑间歇性theta脉冲刺激（iTBS）联合喉上抬训练显著改善了卒中后吞咽困难患者的吞咽功能和神经修复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that bilateral cerebellar intermittent theta-burst stimulation (iTBS) combined with laryngeal elevation training promotes neurorestoration and improves swallowing function in post-stroke dysphagia patients. This novel approach, integrating neuromodulation with behavioral training, offers you a new perspective and potentially effective solution for treating post-stroke dysphagia.

items.title: Rehabilitation Protocols Following Patellar Instability Surgery: A Structured Review of Published Recommendations and AI Generated Guidance.
items.summary: A structured review summarized postoperative rehabilitation protocols for patellar instability surgery (MPFLR, TTO, trochleoplasty) and compared these recommendations with guidance generated by selected artificial intelligence platforms.
items.curatedReason: 这项结构性综述总结了髌骨不稳手术（MPFLR、TTO、滑车成形术）后的康复方案，并与AI生成指南进行了比较。如果你管理髌骨不稳患者，这份综述为你提供了不同术式的康复实践依据，同时让你了解AI工具在制定康复方案中的潜力与局限。
items.titleZh: 髌骨不稳手术后康复方案：已发表建议和AI生成指南的结构性综述
items.summaryZh: 一项结构性综述总结了髌骨不稳手术（内侧髌股韧带重建、胫骨结节截骨术、滑车成形术）后的康复方案，并将其与选定人工智能平台生成的指南进行了比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This structured review summarizes rehabilitation protocols post-patellar instability surgery (MPFLR, TTO, trochleoplasty) and compares them with AI-generated guidance. If you manage patellar instability patients, this review provides evidence for various surgical rehabilitation practices and insights into AI tools' potential and limitations in protocol development.

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort pilot study (N=10) found that a 12-week community-based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) program improved goal performance, satisfaction, and gross motor function (gait speed, walking capacity) in youth with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列试点研究评估了社区强化力量训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫（CP）青少年目标表现、粗大运动功能和无氧能力的影响。结果支持将社区RIPT作为CP青少年的有效康复策略，你可以在康复计划中考虑纳入这种以目标为导向的力量训练。
items.titleZh: 社区强化力量个人训练（RIPT）项目对脑瘫青少年的影响：一项前瞻性队列试点研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列试点研究（N=10）发现，为期12周的社区强化力量个人训练（RIPT）项目改善了脑瘫青少年的目标表现、满意度以及粗大运动功能（步速、步行能力）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort pilot study evaluated the impact of a community-based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) program on goal performance, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity in youth with cerebral palsy (CP). The results support community RIPT as an effective rehabilitation strategy for CP youth; you can consider incorporating this goal-focused strength training into your rehabilitation plans.

items.title: Psychometric properties, acceptability, and feasibility of the Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat for balance assessment with potential for training.
items.summary: A study (N=98 young, N=101 older adults) assessed the Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat's test-retest reliability, concurrent validity, acceptability, and feasibility for balance assessment and training, showing good psychometric properties.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究验证了Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat在平衡评估中的心理测量学特性，并提示其作为训练工具的潜力。SAS Mat弥补了传统平衡测试的局限性，为你提供了一个更灵敏、减少天花板/地板效应的评估和训练工具，尤其适用于老年患者的平衡干预。
items.titleZh: Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat在平衡评估中的心理测量学特性、可接受性和可行性及其训练潜力
items.summaryZh: 一项研究（N=98名年轻人，N=101名老年人）评估了Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat在平衡评估和训练中的重测信度、同时效度、可接受性和可行性，显示出良好的心理测量学特性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study validates the psychometric properties of the Stability, Agility, Strength (SAS) Mat for balance assessment and suggests its potential as a training tool. The SAS Mat addresses limitations of traditional balance tests, offering you a more sensitive assessment and training tool with reduced ceiling/floor effects, particularly useful for balance interventions in older patients.

items.title: Complex interplay between disease and aerobic exercise training on vascular function in an exacerbated emphysema rat model.
items.summary: An animal study in an exacerbated emphysema rat model found that aerobic exercise training improved vascular function (e.g., reduced aortic stiffness, enhanced endothelial-dependent relaxation) in disease conditions, but effects varied based on disease severity.
items.curatedReason: 这项动物研究在加重型肺气肿大鼠模型中探讨了疾病与有氧运动训练对血管功能的复杂相互作用。尽管是动物研究，但其发现支持有氧运动对COPD患者血管功能的潜在益处，并强调了在运动处方中考虑疾病严重程度的重要性。
items.titleZh: 疾病与有氧运动训练对加重型肺气肿大鼠模型血管功能的复杂相互作用
items.summaryZh: 一项在加重型肺气肿大鼠模型中的动物研究发现，有氧运动训练改善了疾病状态下的血管功能（如降低主动脉僵硬度，增强内皮依赖性松弛），但效果因疾病严重程度而异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This animal study explores the complex interplay between disease and aerobic exercise training on vascular function in an exacerbated emphysema rat model. While an animal study, its findings support the potential benefits of aerobic exercise on vascular function in COPD patients and emphasize the importance of considering disease severity in exercise prescription.

items.title: How direct access to physiotherapy reshapes GP gatekeeping for musculoskeletal care in primary care: an exploratory organisational typology across health systems.
items.summary: A qualitative content analysis explored how direct access to physiotherapy reshapes GP gatekeeping for musculoskeletal care across different health systems, characterizing physiotherapist organizational roles.
items.curatedReason: 这项探索性研究通过定性分析，描绘了不同卫生系统中物理治疗师在直接转诊模式下的组织角色配置，以及全科医生在肌肉骨骼疾病管理中守门角色的再分配。如果你在推进物理治疗直接转诊（DA）模式或评估其影响，这篇文献提供了不同模型下的实践洞察。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗直接转诊如何重塑初级保健中全科医生对肌肉骨骼疾病的守门角色：跨卫生系统探索性组织类型学研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性内容分析探索了物理治疗直接转诊如何在不同卫生系统中重塑全科医生对肌肉骨骼护理的守门角色，并描述了物理治疗师的组织角色配置。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory qualitative study describes the organizational role configurations of physiotherapists in direct access (DA) models and the redistribution of GP gatekeeping for MSK conditions across health systems. If you're advancing DA models or evaluating their impact, this offers practical insights across different models.

items.title: Inconsistencies in care: a UK and Ireland survey exploring acute vestibular service provision in adult major trauma centres.
items.summary: A UK and Ireland survey explored inconsistencies in acute vestibular service provision within adult major trauma centers, noting potential gaps in assessment and treatment for traumatic brain injury patients.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对英国和爱尔兰创伤中心的服务调查揭示了急性前庭服务提供的不一致。如果你在神经创伤中心工作，这提示你关注当前对脑损伤后前庭功能障碍的评估和治疗可能存在的差距，并推动相关服务的标准化。
items.titleZh: 护理中的不一致性：英国和爱尔兰一项调查探讨成人主要创伤中心急性前庭服务提供情况
items.summaryZh: 一项针对英国和爱尔兰的调查探讨了成人主要创伤中心急性前庭服务提供中的不一致性，指出创伤性脑损伤患者评估和治疗可能存在的差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey of UK and Ireland major trauma centers reveals inconsistencies in acute vestibular service provision. If you work in a neurotrauma center, this highlights potential gaps in current assessment and treatment of vestibular dysfunction post-brain injury, urging you to advocate for service standardization.

items.title: The relationship between social frailty and self-care ability in elderly stroke patients: the mediating role of self-efficacy.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (N=356) found that self-efficacy mediates the association between social frailty and self-care ability in elderly stroke patients, highlighting psychosocial factors' role in recovery.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究揭示了老年卒中患者社会衰弱与自我护理能力之间的关系，并发现自我效能感在其中起到中介作用。这提示你在制定康复计划时，除了身体功能训练，还要关注患者的社会支持和自我效能提升，以改善其日常自理能力。
items.titleZh: 老年卒中患者社会衰弱与自我护理能力的关系：自我效能的中介作用
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究（N=356）发现，自我效能感在老年卒中患者的社会衰弱与自我护理能力之间起到中介作用，突出了社会心理因素在康复中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study reveals the relationship between social frailty and self-care ability in elderly stroke patients, with self-efficacy acting as a mediator. This indicates that when planning rehabilitation, you should focus on social support and self-efficacy enhancement alongside physical training to improve daily living skills.

items.title: Prevalence of knee pain and factors influencing its risk in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (N=212) among ambulatory chronic stroke survivors in Vietnam estimated the prevalence of knee pain at 53.8% and identified associated factors including hemiplegic side and functional status.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究揭示了慢性卒中幸存者膝关节疼痛的患病率及其影响因素。鉴于步态改变后膝关节疼痛可能限制康复进程，你需要常规筛查卒中患者的膝关节疼痛，并将其纳入全面的康复评估和治疗计划中。
items.titleZh: 慢性卒中幸存者膝关节疼痛的患病率及影响因素
items.summaryZh: 一项针对越南212名慢性卒中幸存者的横断面研究估计，膝关节疼痛患病率为53.8%，并确定了包括偏瘫侧和功能状态在内的相关影响因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study reveals the prevalence and influencing factors of knee pain in chronic stroke survivors. Given that gait alterations can lead to knee pain and limit rehabilitation, you must routinely screen stroke patients for knee pain and integrate it into comprehensive rehabilitation assessment and treatment plans.

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study (N=42) used accelerometry to investigate physical activity levels during the first year after Achilles tendon rupture, finding that patients remained less active than controls even at 12 months post-rupture.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究使用加速计追踪了跟腱断裂后患者第一年的身体活动水平。研究结果提醒你，患者在一年后仍可能未恢复到正常活动水平。在康复计划中，需持续关注并鼓励患者的身体活动量，以更好地实现功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后身体活动水平的加速计评估：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究（N=42）使用加速计调查了跟腱断裂后患者第一年的身体活动水平，发现即使在术后12个月，患者的活动量仍低于对照组。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study tracked physical activity levels in Achilles tendon rupture patients during the first year using accelerometry. The findings indicate that patients may not return to normal activity levels even after a year. In rehabilitation plans, you need to continuously monitor and encourage patient physical activity to better achieve functional recovery.

items.title: Differences in Psychological Readiness and Quadriceps Strength Symmetry Based on Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction Graft Type in Military Academy Cadets.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (N=109) in military academy cadets found that psychological readiness and quadriceps strength symmetry after ACLR differed based on graft type, with bone-patellar tendon-bone grafts showing higher symmetry.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究比较了军事院校学员在不同前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）移植物类型下心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性的差异。这提示你在ACLR术后康复中，除了关注移植物类型，还要重视患者的心理准备状态和双侧力量对称性，以优化RTS决策。
items.titleZh: 军事院校学员前交叉韧带重建术后不同移植物类型下心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性的差异
items.summaryZh: 一项针对军事院校学员的横断面研究（N=109）发现，前交叉韧带重建术后心理准备和股四头肌力量对称性因移植物类型而异，其中骨-髌腱-骨移植物表现出更高的对称性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study compares psychological readiness and quadriceps strength symmetry based on ACLR graft type in military cadets. It suggests that in post-ACLR rehabilitation, beyond graft type, you should prioritize patients' psychological readiness and bilateral strength symmetry to optimize return-to-sport decisions.

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=60) compared the Lung Boost Trainer against an incentive spirometer for improving pulmonary function in COVID-hemiplegic cerebral palsy children, finding significant improvements in both groups but no superior effect of one over the other.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验比较了“肺部提升训练器”与“激励性肺活量计”对COVID相关偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响。这为心肺康复师提供了选择呼吸训练工具的新证据，尤其是在处理有呼吸功能障碍的儿科患者时。
items.titleZh: 肺部提升训练器与激励性肺活量计对COVID相关偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响：随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=60）比较了肺部提升训练器与激励性肺活量计在改善COVID相关偏瘫脑瘫儿童肺功能方面的效果，发现两组均有显著改善，但无显著优劣。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared a 'Lung Boost Trainer' with an 'Incentive Spirometer' on pulmonary function in children with COVID-related hemiplegic cerebral palsy. This provides new evidence for cardiopulmonary rehabilitation therapists when choosing respiratory training tools, especially for pediatric patients with impaired respiratory function.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Effects of Acute Aerobic Exercise and Task Repetition on the Neural Correlates of Executive Function in Young and Older Adults: A Crossover fMRI Study.
items.summary: A prospective randomized crossover fMRI study (N=17 young, N=17 older adults) investigated the effects of acute aerobic exercise and task repetition on brain activity during task switching, finding age-related differences in neural recruitment.
items.curatedReason: 这项交叉fMRI研究探讨了急性有氧运动和任务重复对年轻和老年成人执行功能神经关联的影响。了解急性运动如何调节大脑活动，对你设计老年患者的认知康复和运动处方具有指导意义。
items.titleZh: 急性有氧运动和任务重复对年轻和老年成人执行功能神经关联的影响：一项交叉fMRI研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性随机交叉fMRI研究（N=17名年轻人，N=17名老年人）调查了急性有氧运动和任务重复对任务切换期间大脑活动的影响，发现神经募集存在年龄相关差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This crossover fMRI study investigated the effects of acute aerobic exercise and task repetition on neural correlates of executive function in young and older adults. Understanding how acute exercise modulates brain activity is crucial for you in designing cognitive rehabilitation and exercise prescriptions for older patients.
items.journal: Journal of magnetic resonance imaging : JMRI

items.title: The association between upper limb function, physical exercise, and cognitive ability among empty-nest elderly in China: A cross-sectional study based on CLHLS.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study using CLHLS data (N=2703 empty-nest elderly in China) found positive associations between upper limb function, physical exercise, and cognitive ability, with physical exercise mediating the relationship.
items.curatedReason: 这项横断面研究揭示了空巢老年人上肢功能、体育锻炼与认知能力之间的关联。结果支持上肢功能和体育锻炼对认知健康的重要性。在为中国空巢老年人制定康复方案时，你应着重关注上肢活动和整体体育锻炼的促进，以维护和改善其认知功能。
items.titleZh: 中国空巢老年人上肢功能、体育锻炼与认知能力之间的关联：一项基于CLHLS的横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项使用中国老年健康影响因素跟踪调查（CLHLS）数据（N=2703名中国空巢老年人）的横断面研究发现，上肢功能、体育锻炼与认知能力之间存在正向关联，且体育锻炼在其中起到中介作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study reveals the association between upper limb function, physical exercise, and cognitive ability among empty-nest elderly in China. The results support the importance of upper limb function and physical exercise for cognitive health. When developing rehabilitation plans for empty-nest elderly in China, you should focus on promoting upper limb activity and overall physical exercise to maintain and improve their cognitive function.

items.title: Lard Intake Reduced Tetralinoleoyl Cardiolipin and Attenuated the Cardioprotective Effects of Exercise in Mice With Pressure Overload-Induced Heart Failure.
items.summary: An animal study found that lard intake reduced tetralinoleoyl cardiolipin and attenuated the cardioprotective effects of exercise in mice with pressure overload-induced heart failure, highlighting diet's role in exercise benefits.
items.curatedReason: 这项动物研究揭示了膳食脂肪摄入与运动对心力衰竭模型小鼠心血管保护作用的复杂相互作用。尽管是动物模型，但这提示你应关注患者饮食结构对心肺康复效果的潜在影响，特别是高饱和脂肪摄入可能会削弱运动训练的益处。
items.titleZh: 猪油摄入降低四亚油酰心磷脂并减弱运动对压力超负荷性心力衰竭小鼠的心脏保护作用
items.summaryZh: 一项动物研究发现，猪油摄入降低了四亚油酰心磷脂，并减弱了运动对压力超负荷性心力衰竭小鼠的心脏保护作用，突显了饮食在运动益处中的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This animal study reveals the complex interplay between dietary fat intake and exercise on cardioprotective effects in heart failure mice. Although an animal model, it suggests you should consider the potential impact of patients' dietary composition on cardiopulmonary rehabilitation outcomes, especially how high saturated fat intake might attenuate exercise training benefits.

items.title: Pathophysiology, diagnosis, and management of discogenic low back pain: a phenotype-driven precision framework for surgical and interventional decision-making.
items.summary: This review proposes a phenotype-driven precision framework for discogenic low back pain (DLBP), addressing its heterogeneous pathophysiology and offering guidance for surgical and interventional decision-making.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述提出了椎间盘源性下腰痛（DLBP）的表型驱动精准框架，用于指导手术和介入决策。作为康复专业人士，你需要了解DLBP的异质性病理生理学，并将其作为综合评估的一部分，以便与疼痛管理团队协作，提供更精准的非手术康复方案。
items.titleZh: 椎间盘源性下腰痛的病理生理学、诊断和管理：基于表型驱动的精准框架指导手术和介入决策
items.summaryZh: 这篇综述提出了椎间盘源性下腰痛（DLBP）的表型驱动精准框架，旨在解决其异质性病理生理学，并为手术和介入决策提供指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review proposes a phenotype-driven precision framework for discogenic low back pain (DLBP) to guide surgical and interventional decisions. As a rehabilitation professional, you need to understand DLBP's heterogeneous pathophysiology as part of a comprehensive assessment to collaborate with pain management teams and offer more precise non-surgical rehabilitation plans.

items.title: Preventative strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries among male football players: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified a range of preventative strategies used to reduce non-contact lower limb injuries among male football players, categorizing them into warm-up, strength, balance, and proprioception programs.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述梳理了男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略。如果你负责足球运动员的运动康复，这篇综述为你提供了全面的损伤预防方法概览，帮助你优化训练计划，降低非接触性下肢损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的预防策略：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述确定了用于减少男性足球运动员非接触性下肢损伤的一系列预防策略，将其分为热身、力量、平衡和本体感觉训练方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review synthesizes preventive strategies for non-contact lower limb injuries in male football players. If you manage football player rehabilitation, this review offers a comprehensive overview of injury prevention methods, helping you optimize training programs and reduce the risk of non-contact lower limb injuries.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Effectiveness of shortwave diathermy in patients with chronic low back pain: A study protocol for a randomised, single-blinded, multicentre clinical trial.
items.summary: This is a study protocol for a randomized, single-blinded, multicentre clinical trial to evaluate the effectiveness of shortwave diathermy in patients with chronic low back pain, a treatment widely used despite international guidelines classifying it as low-value.
items.curatedReason: 这是对慢性下腰痛患者短波透热疗法有效性的研究方案。尽管现有指南将其列为低价值治疗，但该疗法在实践中仍广泛使用。这项研究的结果值得关注，以评估短波透热疗法在临床中的真实价值。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗慢性下腰痛患者的有效性：一项随机、单盲、多中心临床试验的研究方案
items.summaryZh: 这是一项随机、单盲、多中心临床试验的研究方案，旨在评估短波透热疗法治疗慢性下腰痛患者的有效性；尽管国际指南将其列为低价值治疗，但该疗法仍被广泛使用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a study protocol for shortwave diathermy effectiveness in CLBP. Despite guidelines classifying it as low-value, it's still widely used. Watch for the results to truly assess its clinical value.

items.title: Supported implementation enhances injury prevention programme (Prep-to-Play) use in women and girls playing Australian Football: a pragmatic type III hybrid implementation-effectiveness stepped wedge cluster randomised trial
items.summary: A stepped wedge cluster RCT of 165 women's/girls' Australian Football teams (2481 players) found that supported implementation of the Prep-to-Play injury prevention program significantly increased program use and reduced injury incidence by 30%.
items.curatedReason: 澳大利亚这项 RCT 证实，通过“支持性实施”方法能显著提高青少年和成年女子澳式橄榄球运动员的伤害预防项目 Prep-to-Play 使用依从性，并将伤害发生率降低 30%。对于重视运动损伤预防的临床实践，这是提升项目有效性的重要途径。
items.titleZh: 支持性实施显著提升女子澳式橄榄球伤害预防项目 Prep-to-Play 的使用依从性及效果：一项分阶段整群随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项涵盖 2481 名女子澳式橄榄球运动员的整群随机对照试验显示，通过支持性实施（supported implementation），伤害预防项目 Prep-to-Play 的使用依从性显著提高，同时伤害发生率降低了 30%。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Australian RCT confirms that "supported implementation" significantly boosts adherence to the Prep-to-Play injury prevention program in youth and adult female Australian Football players, leading to a 30% reduction in injury incidence. For clinics prioritizing sports injury prevention, this highlights a critical pathway to enhance program effectiveness.

items.title: Effectiveness of Radial Extracorporeal Shockwave Therapy Versus Other Electrophysical Modalities on Pain and Functionality in Patients With Plantar Fasciitis: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis found radial extracorporeal shockwave therapy (rESWT) superior to other electrophysical modalities for pain and functionality in patients with plantar fasciitis.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和 Meta 分析发现，径向体外冲击波疗法（rESWT）在减轻足底筋膜炎（PF）疼痛和改善功能方面优于其他电物理疗法。当你为 PF 患者选择理疗方案时，rESWT 应该作为优先考虑的非侵入性选项，特别是考虑到其“实用性和成本效益”。
items.titleZh: 径向体外冲击波疗法与其他电物理疗法对足底筋膜炎患者疼痛和功能影响的有效性：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和 Meta 分析发现，径向体外冲击波疗法（rESWT）在减轻足底筋膜炎患者疼痛和改善功能方面优于其他电物理疗法。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis found radial extracorporeal shockwave therapy (rESWT) superior to other electrophysical modalities for reducing pain and improving function in plantar fasciitis (PF). When choosing physical therapy options for PF patients, rESWT should be a prioritized non-invasive choice, especially given its "practicality and cost-effectiveness."

items.title: Physiotherapists' perception of barriers and facilitators to the implementation of digital health interventions: a scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review summarized physiotherapists' perceptions of barriers and facilitators to the implementation of digital health interventions, highlighting the slow adoption despite potential benefits.
items.curatedReason: 这项范围综述系统地总结了物理治疗师对数字健康干预（DHIs）实施障碍和促进因素的看法。它明确指出，尽管 DHIs 潜力巨大，但采用速度缓慢，你需要关注技术整合、培训、工作流程适应和患者接受度等关键因素，以有效推动远程康复和数字化实践。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师对数字健康干预实施障碍和促进因素的看法：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述总结了物理治疗师对数字健康干预实施障碍和促进因素的看法，强调了尽管有潜在益处，但采用速度缓慢。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically summarizes physical therapists' perceptions of barriers and facilitators to digital health intervention (DHI) implementation. It clearly states that despite DHIs' immense potential, adoption is slow; you need to focus on key factors like technology integration, training, workflow adaptation, and patient acceptance to effectively drive telerehabilitation and digital practices.

items.title: Peripheral Nerve Field Stimulation in the Treatment of Persistent Low Back Pain: A Retrospective Study.
items.summary: A retrospective study assessed peripheral nerve field stimulation (PNFS) for persistent low back pain, showing long-term efficacy and reduced opioid use over a mean follow-up of 49.3 months.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究显示外周神经场刺激（PNFS）对顽固性慢性腰痛（CLBP）患者具有长期疗效，并减少了阿片类药物使用。对于传统治疗无效的 CLBP 患者，PNFS 提供了一个值得关注的非药物选择，但你需要注意这仍是回顾性数据，需更高质量研究验证。
items.titleZh: 外周神经场刺激治疗持续性腰痛：一项回顾性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性研究评估了外周神经场刺激（PNFS）治疗持续性腰痛的效果，结果显示平均 49.3 个月的随访期内，PNFS 具有长期疗效并能减少阿片类药物使用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study shows Peripheral Nerve Field Stimulation (PNFS) offers long-term efficacy for intractable chronic low back pain (CLBP) and reduces opioid use. For CLBP patients unresponsive to traditional therapies, PNFS presents a notable non-pharmacological option, but be aware this is retrospective data; higher-quality studies are needed for validation.
